# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write Kubernetes Deployment manifests with Istio sidecar injection disabled using sidecar.istio.io/inject:"false" annotation. Skip sidecar proxies for certain services that need direct network access without mesh policies. This is for services that require low latency without proxy overhead.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: my-deployment
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-app
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
      labels:
        app: my-app
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: my-container
        image: docker.io/my-image:latest
      serviceAccountName: my-service-account
      nodeSelector:
        type: "worker"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: my-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: my-app
  ports:
  - port: 80
    targetPort: 80
  type: LoadBalancer
